post.summary: Allocate a server for a new VM

get.summary: Get boot parameters for a server or "default"
get.description: Note: Original Node.js had separate /boot/default and /boot/:server_uuid endpoints. Dropshot's tree router doesn't allow a literal and variable at the same path level, so we use a single /boot/{server_uuid} endpoint where server_uuid can be "default" or an actual UUID.

put.summary: Update boot parameters for a server or "default"

post.summary: Set boot parameters for a server or "default"

parameters.name: extras
parameters.description: Comma-separated extras: agents, vms, memory, disk, sysinfo, capacity, all

parameters.name: uuids
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of UUIDs to look up

get.summary: Get all dataset properties on a server

post.summary: Create a dataset on a server

get.summary: Get properties of a specific dataset

post.summary: Rollback a dataset to a snapshot
Create a snapshot of a dataset
Ensure an image is available on the server
Receive heartbeat event from a server
Receive status update event from a server
Execute a command on a server via cn-agent

get.summary: Get image info on a server

post.summary: Install an agent on the server
Dispatch NIC update task to cn-agent

get.summary: Get task history for a server
List waitlist tickets for a server

delete.summary: Delete all waitlist tickets for a server

post.description: Note: Original Node.js path was /servers/:server_uuid/vms/nics/update which conflicts with Dropshot's tree router (/vms/{uuid} vs /vms/nics). Remapped to /servers/:server_uuid/vm-nics/update.

get.summary: List VMs on a server (deprecated: use VMAPI instead)

post.summary: Create a VM on a server
Docker copy files to/from a VM
Execute a Docker command in a VM

get.summary: Get Docker stats for a VM

post.summary: Create an image from a VM

get.summary: Wait for a task to complete

BootParamsBody.description: Body for POST/PUT boot params endpoints

PlatformListResponse.description: Platform list response. The original response is a JSON object keyed by platform image name with arrays of server UUIDs as values.

Server.description: Server object as returned by CNAPI

Task.description: Task object as stored in Moray

TaskResponse.description: Generic task response returned by endpoints that dispatch work to cn-agent

id.description: The task ID that can be used to poll for status
